title: vitis aestivalis var. smalliana
intro: Vitis aestivalis var. smalliana, also known as Small's grapevine, is a species of grapevine native to eastern North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vitis aestivalis var. smalliana include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral properties. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
